Command.Name: format
Command.Description: Formats XML documentation comments in *.cs files

Argument.Name: file-path
Argument.Description: The path of the file to format XML documentation comments in. When the -d or -r flag is specified, this path is treated as a directory path, which formats XML documentation comments in all *.cs files in the directory, and optionally its subdirectories.

Option.Description: When specified, treats the file path as a directory, which formats all *.cs files contained in the specified directory, but not recursively.
When specified, treats the file path as a directory, which formats all *.cs files contained in the specified directory and all its subdirectories.

The max length of every line, which determines at which point to break XML documentation comment lines. This ONLY affects XML documentation; regular code will not be affected, regardless of its line length.
The path of the output. When not specified, the tool overwrites the files.
The maximum parallelism to use across formatting multiple files. Defaults to 0, which means the tool will automatically determine the optimal degree of parallelism based on processor count.
Print everything plainly without styling such as colors, ASCII art, etc.
